mxCell.value:
Phase 0
Project Scaffold
Verify manifest JSON
Check folder structure
Validate phase_0 status

Phase 1
Narrative
CC writes skeleton
Parallel Grok prose
CC assembles output

Phase 2
Graph Construction
CC parser + frame enricher
Grok tagger + validators
Prompt assembly + materialize

Phase 3
Visual Assets
Cast/Loc/Prop refs
Storyboard grids
Asset quality gate

Phase 4
Composition
Sequential frame gen
ShotPacket prompts
Ref image injection

Phase 5
Video Gen
Grok vision refine
Pipelined clip gen
Native audio prompts

M1 — Entity Seeder
Produces: Cast, Locations, Props,
Scenes, World Context, Edges

M2 — Frame Parser
Produces: FrameNodes,
CastFrameState, PropFrameState, LocationFrameState

M3 — Dialogue Wirer
Produces: DialogueNodes,
Dialogue-Frame Edges,
Performance Cues

M5 — Continuity Wirer
Produces: Merged Overlays, Continuity Edges,
Validation, graph_assemble_prompts, graph_materialize

All agents share cached Context Seed
(manifest + config + skeleton + prose)
~90% input cache discount on Agents 2-5

Completion Signals
logs/morpheus/*_complete.json
Each agent writes signal before next starts

States are absolute snapshots,
not deltas. Full state per frame.

ShotPacket
Assembled per-frame from FrameNode + CastNode
+ LocationNode + PropNode + DialogueNode

Key Enums: FormulaTag, ShotSize,
CameraAngle, CameraMotion,
LightingDirection, EmotionalArc,
Posture, EdgeType

Image Prompt
SHOT INTENT
CONTINUITY ANCHORS
BLOCKING & STAGING
ENVIRONMENT

Video Prompt
CAMERA MOTION
SHOT DYNAMICS
CONTINUITY
AUDIO:
- Native spoken dialogue
- Ambient layers

Formula System
FormulaTag enum
(CU, MCU, MS, WS...)

Media Style Prefix
MEDIA_STYLE_PREFIX lookup
(anime, live retro, etc.)

FastAPI Server
localhost:8000
server.py

Manifest reconciler
File sentinel watcher
Agent process mgmt
